title: UMIBamDeduplicator
author: David, Cheishvili
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: UMIBamDeduplicator is a Python script designed to mitigate PCR amplification bias in sequencing data by deduplicating reads in BAM files using Unique Molecular Identifiers (UMIs). It processes paired reads, creating a deduplicated BAM file, and generates a summary report detailing the deduplication metrics. Utilizing the pysam library for BAM file operations, this script is a straightforward tool for refining sequencing data for more accurate downstream analysis.
